title: datura coccinea
intro: Datura coccinea, also known as the red angel's trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits associated with Datura coccinea include relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its use as a sedative and anticonvulsant. Datura coccinea is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to exercise caution when handling the plant due to its potential toxicity.
